passedAssertions.reason: The pointer-events fix from commit fcf8705 is verified working. A normal user click (no JS workaround) on the 'Run discovery' button succeeded - the click passed through the onboarding overlay and opened the discovery setup wizard. NO discovery POST request was sent.

keyAccomplishments: Verified VAL-DISCOVERY-001 fix is working: normal user clicks pass through onboarding overlay to reach Run discovery button
Confirmed discovery setup wizard opens correctly when no endpoint is configured
Confirmed NO discovery POST is sent when clicking Run discovery without a configured endpoint
Validated the pointer-events CSS fix (fcf8705) allows clicks through the overlay while keeping the dialog inner content interactive

discoveredFixes.description: Allow clicks through overlay to reach Run discovery button - fixes VAL-DISCOVERY-001
discoveredFixes.details: Added pointer-events:none to .onboarding-wizard overlay and pointer-events:auto to .onboarding-wizard__inner, allowing underlying buttons to receive clicks while keeping the dialog content interactive.
